_INSTRUCTIONS.step1: Copy this file to config.json (same folder)
_INSTRUCTIONS.step2: Fill in each value below — do NOT commit config.json to git
_INSTRUCTIONS.step3: Run: python pipeline.py --setup   to verify everything works

youtube._note: Download client_secrets.json from Google Cloud Console > APIs & Services > Credentials > OAuth 2.0 Client IDs > Download JSON

blogger._note: Blog ID: go to blogger.com > Settings > scroll to 'Blog ID'

github._note: repo_path: local folder where you cloned github.com/henrynkoh/rightlydividingkjv. Example: /Users/henryoh/repos/rightlydividingkjv

videos._note: Folder where your recorded .mp4 files are stored. Files should be named: post-NNN.mp4 (e.g., post-141.mp4)

publishing._note: Thumbnail images: thumbnails/post-NNN.jpg (optional). If missing, YouTube uses auto-generated thumbnail.

tracking._note: Auto-created by pipeline.py to persist YouTube IDs and Blogger URLs per post
